member.name: T:MatrixMath
member.summary: Class containing matrix math utility methods.

member.name: M:MatrixMath.Shear2D(System.Double[0:,0:],System.Char,System.Double)
member.summary: Shears a square 2D matrix by a given shear factor in either the X or Y direction.
member.returns: The sheared matrix, or a matrix containing -1 if invalid input.
